For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum Take-off Fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight in an MRJT aeroplane, given the following information? The operator has nominated a suitable En-Route Alternate aerodrome according to the basic fuel scheme with variations.

Estimated flight time: 03:57
Estimated flight time to alternate: 00:20

Holding fuel flow: 2600 kg/h
